summary.caveat: Coat color prediction requires targeted SNP probes for E/A loci. Commercial tests (Embark, Wisdom Panel) give definitive results.
summary.irf4_note: No IRF4 deletion detected in this sample.

E.name: Extension locus
E.interpretation: Queried 2 key positions; 1 found in panel or BAM. Homozygous alt at one position — possible recessive red or mask allele; definitive calling requires targeted probes.
E.phenotype_contribution: Determines whether dog can produce black/brown pigment

K.name: Dominant black locus
K.role: Dominant black (KB) or brindle (kbr) vs agouti (ky)
K.interpretation: Queried 2 key positions; 2 found in panel or BAM. Heterozygous at one position — likely ky/ky or ky/kbr; A locus pattern likely expressed.
K.phenotype_contribution: Likely agouti-expressing (ky) — A locus pattern active

A.name: Agouti locus
A.role: Controls agouti signaling (sable, tricolor, recessive black)
A.interpretation: Queried 2 key positions; 0 found in panel or BAM. A locus alleles not covered by Dog10K panel; cannot determine pattern.

B.name: Brown locus
B.interpretation: Queried 2 key positions; 2 found in panel or BAM. Likely homozygous at first position; second position reference — B locus status uncertain without functional annotation.
B.phenotype_contribution: Eumelanin pigment type — black vs brown/liver

D.name: Dilution locus
D.interpretation: Queried 2 key positions; 2 found in panel or BAM. Both homozygous reference — no dilution alleles detected.

M.name: Merle locus
M.interpretation: Merle is caused by a SINE insertion not detectable from short-read WGS SNP calling. No merle-associated SNPs queried.
M.phenotype_contribution: Likely non-merle (insertion-based — cannot confirm by SNP)

S.name: Spotting locus
S.interpretation: Queried 1 key position; 0 found in panel or BAM. No white spotting alleles detected.

W.name: White locus
W.interpretation: Queried 0 key positions; 0 found in panel or BAM. KIT extreme white alleles not queried.

method: Key positions queried from GLIMPSE2-imputed BCF and BAM pileup
